chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SMA 418 of 2019 _________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge _________________________________________________________ For hearing of main petition. 28.01.2020. Mr. Tanweer Hussain, Advocate for the petitioner. Petitioner Mst. Fatima Bano, legal heir 1. Mst. Aisha, Legal heir 2. Mr. Muhammad Haroon Ghouri, legal heir 3. Mr. Muhammad Umer Ghouri, legal heir 4. Ms. Naheed Yahya, legal heir 5. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf, legal heir 6. Ms. Asma Parvaiz, legal heir 7. Ms. Uzma Younis, legal heir 8. Mr. Saqib Nadeem, legal heir 9. Ms. Shazia, legal heir 10. Two witnesses Mr. Mirza Sultan Baig and Muhammad Shafiq are also present. Per the report of the Deputy Registrar (O.S.) dated 09.01.2020 (“Report”), all prerequisites in respect hereof have been complied with and publication has also been effected, to which no objections have been received. The petitioner and the remaining legal heirs mentioned supra are present before the Court alongwith two witnesses. Those present reaffirm the contents of the petition and the affidavits. In view hereof, it appears that this is a non-contentious matter and there is no impediment to the grant hereof, hence, this petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue letters of administration, in respect of the asset identified per the Report, as per the Rules. J U D G E Farooq PS/*
